result.headline: 纳指趋势转弱，空头信号增强
result.subline: 短期跌幅扩大，中期趋势下行
result.short_reading: NDX当前处于强下跌趋势，21日跌幅达7.6%，63日跌幅9.8%，回撤已超11%。波动率正常，但方向明确偏空。
result.long_reading: 根据市场脉冲引擎分析，NDX在2026年5月17日收盘报23132.77点，近一个月累计下跌7.6%，近三个月下跌9.8%，动量标签为强下跌趋势。尽管63日波动率（16.75%）处于正常范围，但252日最大回撤已至11.4%，属于实质性回撤。当前组合显示空头动能持续，短期内反弹动能不足，需警惕进一步下行风险。中长期趋势若无法收复关键均线，可能演变为更大级别的调整。

result_en.headline: The trend of the nano index weakens and the short signal strengthens.
result_en.subline: Short-term declines widen, medium-term trend downward
result_en.short_reading: NDX is currently in a strong downward trend, down 7.6 percent on the 21st and 9.8 percent on the 63rd, with a pullback of more than 11 percent. Volatility is normal, but the direction is clear and short.
result_en.long_reading: According to market pulse engine analysis, NDX closed at 23132.77 points on May 17, 2026, down 7.6 percent in the last month and 9.8 percent in the last 3 months, with momentum labeled as a strong downtrend. Although 63-day volatility (16.75 per cent) is in the normal range, the 252-day maximum retracement has reached 11.4 per cent, which is a material retracement. The current combination shows that short momentum continues, short-term rebound momentum is insufficient, need to be alert to further downside risks. If the medium-and long-term trend fails to recover the key moving average, it may evolve into a larger level of adjustment.
